---
title: "About Me"
toc: false
---

## Hi, I'm Aadil Rasheed

I'm a [your role] based in [your location].

<!-- Replace this section with your own bio -->

I'm passionate about [your interests]. My work focuses on [your focus areas].

---

## Skills

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
**Programming**

- Python
- R
- JavaScript
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
**Tools & Frameworks**

- Quarto
- Git
- Docker
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
**Areas**

- Data Science
- Machine Learning
- Web Development
:::

:::

---

## Experience

**Job Title** | Company Name | 2022 – Present
Brief description of your role and key achievements.

**Previous Role** | Previous Company | 2020 – 2022
Brief description of your role and key achievements.

---

## Education

**Degree** | University Name | Year
Field of study.

---

## Contact

Feel free to reach out via [email](mailto:your@email.com) or connect on [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/your-username).
